items.title: jaimeirazabal1/rag-architectures
items.abstract_or_description: Sistema RAG con 6 arquitecturas implementadas como microservicios independientes en FastAPI + Docker: Naïve RAG, Advanced RAG, Modular RAG, GraphRAG, Agentic RAG y Hybrid RAG. items.title: Knight1112D/Tienkung_vla_collect_data
items.abstract_or_description: This script is used for data collection on the Tiangong 2.0 robot. It supports three-camera data acquisition, 6-DOF dexterity hand and grasper input, and can automatically collect topic content, frequency, and head tilt commands. Convenient data collection allows for one-click stopping and exiting.
